subcodes.first_line: The divine Call is raised from the Prison of 'Akká in the watches of night and day, making mention of both the holy ones and the handmaidens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندای الهی در لیالی و ایام از سجن عکا مرتفع اولیا را ذکر مینماید و همچنین اماء
subcodes.subjects: @the ephemeral and the eternal, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
